Part A. The home health spell of illness ends with the close of the first period of 60 
consecutive days in which the individual is neither an inpatient of a hospital or rural 
primary care hospital nor an inpatient of a skilled nursing facility (in which the individual 
was furnished post-hospital extended care services) nor provided home health services. 

EXAMPLE 1: 

An individual is enrolled in Part A and Part B, qualifies for the Medicare home health
